name: Chocolate Nut Chip Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Coarsely chopped nuts (pecans, walnuts, almonds, or hazelnuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a bowl, mix together flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt until well combined.
3. Cream shortening, brown sugar, granulated sugar, egg, water or milk, and vanilla extract in a large bowl using an electric mixer on medium speed until light and creamy.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the mixture on low speed, stirring just until blended.
5. Stir in white chocolate chips and chopped nuts.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto ungreased baking sheets, leaving space between each cookie for spreading.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 7-9 minutes.
8. The cookies will be soft and moist when removed from the oven but firm up slightly as they cool.
9. Allow the cookies to cool slightly before transferring them to a cooling rack. Makes about 3-1/2 dozen cookies. Freezing: Excellent
